searchWithInput.tipsContent:
↑/↓：Previous/Next tag, supports looping.
Tab：Select tag.
-/+：Previous/Next page.

guide.title: Guide/
guide.tips2: Click tags under images to add them to filters.
guide.tips3: If images fail to load, just click submit again.
guide.tips4: Submit an empty input to clear.
guide.tips5: Attachment text can be copied. Promo codes coming soon...?

mail.title: Update Progress
mail._comment2: 每次更新：版本号，版本名称，时间，进度
mail.mailContent:
Dear Timekeeper：
    The curtain is slowly rising on Version 3.7《ON ANOTHER'S SORROW》. Our current preparations are as follows：
        ◦ Official update notice released ✔
        ◦ Game update ✘
        ◦ Awaiting film development ✘
        ◦ Organizing photographs ✘
        ◦ Update deployment ✘
    The fragmented photographs await the moment they see the light of day. This may require a little patience; may this brief pause bring about a more flawless reunion. Thank you for your patience.

about.title: About/
about.tips1: [About the Timeline] The timeline data is gathered from the internet. To be honest, I haven't done any rigorous lore research or fact-checking myself.
about.tips2: [Image Sources] These images are extracted from datamined game files (though I wasn't the one who actually did the datamining).
about.tips3: [Special CGs] These CGs were added to the game files in a certain version update but seem to be completely unused (or perhaps I just haven't stumbled across them yet!).
about.tips4: [Community Images] These are official artworks posted on social media platforms, but they were also packed directly into the game's files.
about.tips5: [Current Status] The core construction of this project is finally complete, and it has now entered a phase of regular, iterative updates.

guide.tips: You can change this later in Settings/后续可在设置中更改.
